TIN_SEPARATION.MAGNITUDE_RULE: non-BE vs BE per-tin delay gap must exceed the Snapshot A baseline 3-run spread

NOISE_BAND_MS.derivation: max non-BE-vs-BE per-tin delay gap noise band from Snapshot A 3-run spread

_notes: GATE-01 single source of truth. GATE-01-THRESHOLDS.md is the prose provenance record and must not duplicate numeric literals. Thresholds are pre-registered and locked before any Phase 227 candidate deploy; Task 1 freezes the tin-separation rule and Task 3 fills only the baseline-derived NOISE_BAND_MS constant.
